Description: Benchmark deterministic cho family authoring backend: document -> params -> planes -> forms -> visibility/material -> type catalog -> verify.

Use_When: muon harden backend family authoring bang benchmark deterministic
muon stress test lane parameter/formula/reference plane/type catalog
muon co artifact pass/fail ro rang truoc khi mo connector/alignment/exotic geometry
Dont_Use_When: muc tieu la giao commercial family production-ready ngay
task bat buoc connector, nested family, hoac adaptive geometry ngay tu pass dau
can full flex geometry theo type catalog truoc khi xac nhan lane alignment
DecisionGate.Prefer_Over: family_create_parametric.v1.json khi muc tieu la hardening backend truoc, khong phai geometry showcase.

Steps.Purpose: Tao family benchmark moi va activate vao UI de cac buoc sau target dung family doc.
Steps.Verify: document.get_active -> IsFamilyDocument = true, Title contains benchmark family name.

Steps.Purpose: Tao parameter graph cho geometry, formulas, visibility, va material.
Steps.Verify: family.xray shows type + instance parameters for Width/Height/Depth/visibility/material.

Steps.Purpose: Tao 7 reference planes on dinh cho dimension va benchmark verification.
Steps.Verify: family.list_geometry shows required reference plane names.

Steps.Purpose: Tao Body / Accessories / Voids de benchmark graphics + grouping lane.
Steps.Verify: Subcategories exist and can be reused by geometry forms.

Steps.Purpose: Tao 4 forms deterministic: body, cavity void, access panel, inspection window.
Gan subcategory ro rang cho tung form thay vi rely vao magic defaults.
Bind material parameters vao body va accessory forms.
Steps.Verify: No fatal diagnostics; material binding degrades to warning neu family/editor khong ho tro toan bo path.

Steps.Purpose: Gan yes/no visibility cho access panel va inspection window.
Steps.Verify: family.xray shows HasAccessPanel / HasInspectionWindow and no fatal visibility diagnostics.

Steps.Purpose: Tao width / depth / height dimensions giua reference planes va bind vao parameters.
Khoi dong formula graph de harden parameter/formula lane.
Tao 5 benchmark types co visibility/config combinations khac nhau.
Steps.Verify: family.xray -> TypesCount >= 5 and required type names exist.

Steps.Purpose: Kiem tra anatomy benchmark sau khi setup xong.
Steps.Verify: TypesCount >= 5, formulas present, reference planes present.
Forms >= 4 and required subcategories/reference planes exist.

StretchScenarios.Goal: Test family.add_alignment_safe cho top/bottom face, tách riêng khỏi core benchmark.
StretchScenarios.ReasonDeferred: Face indexing va view-specific alignment can fail noisy; khong de nhieu benchmark core.

StretchScenarios.Goal: Test family.add_connector_safe tren template Mechanical Equipment.
StretchScenarios.ReasonDeferred: Connector semantics va system classification la lane khac, nen mo sau khi core generic benchmark on dinh.
